legal.title: Terms & Privacy
legal.termsContent:
Last updated: June 2026

1. Acceptance of Terms
By downloading, installing, or using this game, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the game.

2. License
We grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the game for personal, non-commercial entertainment purposes.

3. Virtual Items
Coins, skins, and other virtual items have no real-world monetary value and cannot be exchanged for cash. We may modify or remove virtual items at any time.

4. User Conduct
You agree not to cheat, exploit bugs, harass other players, or use the game in any way that violates applicable laws.

5. Changes
We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the game after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

6. Contact
For questions about these terms, contact us at support@example.com.
legal.privacyContent:
Last updated: June 2026

1. Information We Collect
We may collect gameplay data (scores, progress, device type), analytics events, and optional account information when you sign in with Google or Apple.

2. How We Use Information
We use collected data to operate the game, improve features, display leaderboards, process purchases, and send relevant notifications.

3. Third-Party Services
The game may use third-party services such as Firebase Analytics, ad networks, and payment providers. Each service has its own privacy policy.

4. Data Storage
Game progress may be stored locally on your device and synced to our servers when you are signed in.

5. Children's Privacy
The game is not directed at children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.

6. Your Rights
Depending on your region, you may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data by contacting support@example.com.

7. Changes
We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes through the app or our website.

howToPlay.title: How to Play
howToPlay.content:
Goal
Jump, collect coins, and avoid obstacles to get the highest score possible.

Controls
• Tap anywhere on the screen to jump
• Press Space on keyboard (desktop)
• You can jump up to 5 times before landing on the ground

Collectibles
• Gold coins: +10 score and +1 coin for your wallet
• Red obstacles: touching them ends the game

Scoring
Your score increases when you collect coins. Try to beat your personal best and climb the leaderboard.

Game Over
When you hit a red obstacle, the run ends. You can retry immediately or return to the home screen.

Other Features
• Missions: watch rewarded ads to earn coin rewards
• Daily Reward: claim free rewards once per calendar day
• Shop: spend coins on skins and boosts
• Leaderboard: compare your best score with other players
